results.title: Türkiye’s CHP counts down to split amid row over lawmakers
results.description: Türkiye’s oldest party will soon produce its newest. The “New Party,” as it has been tentatively dubbed by media outlets close to the main opposition Republican People’s Party (CHP...

results.title: U.S. pounds Iran with airstrikes after 2 American troops killed by Iranian attack in Jordan
results.description: President Trump ordered another wave of U.S. airstrikes against Iran early Sunday following an Iranian attack on a base in Jordan that killed at least two American troops. The two sides are now barreling toward all-out war, if they're not there already, after a brief ceasefire fell apart earlier this month. ...

results.title: Outrage as WAEC drops Efik language from examination syllabus
results.description: The Obong of Calabar Executive Forum (OCEF) has described the delisting of the Efik language from the WAEC curriculum as "an assault on the Efik people" and demanded its immediate reinstatement. The post Outrage as WAEC drops Efik language from examination syllabus appeared first on The Sun Nigeria .

results.title: Trump uses primetime address to the nation to once again raise doubts about past elections
results.description: President Donald Trump is set to address the nation on Thursday night on topics he said will include elections and voting machines, suggesting he is likely to revisit some of the unproven claims he has previously made about Republican losses, particularly his own in 2020.
